titleStmt.title: SII 17.736: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 736. (A.R. No. 679 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAIVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: At the entrance into the maṇḍapa in the central shrine of the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.

This inscription records the royal order (irājakam) granting the proceeds from taxes like, śōḍi mugampārvai, aggaśālaikal, śampaḍam, viśēsha-Adāyam, ariśikāṇam, nal-erudu, naṟ-paśu, veṭṭi and kaṭṭāyam in favour of the temples at Kāñchīpuram, Kāḷahasti, Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruppālaivanam, Tirumullaivāyal and other Śaiva and Vaishṇava temples, of Chandragiri for the conduct of daily services and festivals without break and stating that the temple lands should not be leased out. This order was issued at the instance of VayiravanāyiṉAr and the māhēśvaras of the temples, who represented that the services and festivals in the temple were not conducted properly as the incomes from taxes and from the temple lands were misappropriated by the Jīvitakkāṛar, the state officials and the Sthānattār.Similar inscriptions are found at Tiruvaigāvūr (A.R. Ep., 1915, pp: 106-108) and at Vṛiddhāchalam (A.R. Ep.; 1913; App: C; No. 92).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman rājamay be restored as º�dhirājapara meśvaran śrīvirapradāpa devarāya mahārāyar cantirakiri rājyam kāñcipuram tirukkāḷatti tiruoṟṟiūr tiruvālaṅkāṭu tiruppālaivanam tirumullaivāyal maṟṟum Uḷḷiṭṭa civasthāṉam viṣṇusthāṉam palataḷi tevasthāṉam caṟuvamāṉiyam Uḷḷiṭṭa stāṉamkaḷil tāṉattārkku
nirupam taṅkaḷ�may be restored as ºtavatāṉaṅkaḷile. kaṭaikkūṭṭāna coṭi mukampārvai Aṅkacālaikaḷ campaṭam viceṣātāyam Ivaiyiṟṟileyum tevamaṇṭala Ūrkaḷ civitakārar Atikāri kaṭaik kūṭṭar tāṉattār kuttakai koḷḷukaiyālum Ivaiyiṟṟuṉāle kuṭiyuḷḷatum kulaintu mahāpūcai tiṅkaḷ tivasam tiruppa
ṇiyum naṭavāma[�]may be restored as ºla potukiṟate. ṉṟu panmāhecurarum vayiravanāyiṉārum namakku viṇṇap ppam ceytārkaḷ Anta tevamaṇṭalaṅkaḷil Atikāri coṭi mukampārvaiyum kaṭaikkūṭṭāṉa coṭimukam pārvaiyuṅ Aṅkacālaikaḷ campaṭam viceṣātāyam Aricikāṇam nal Erutu naṟpacu veṭṭi kaṭṭāyam Inta vakaip paṭi mutal Uḷḷa
tu panmāhecura�may be restored as ºrayum vayiravayināyiṉā raiyum mun Iṭṭuk koṇṭu śrīpaṇṭārattile mutal Iṭṭu mahāpūcai tiruppaṇi tiṅkaḷ tivasam tirunāḷ ni(t)tyauṟcamaṅkaḷum tāḻvaṟa naṭattik koḷḷak kaṭavatu Ākavum devamaṇṭalaṅkaḷ Iyātoruttaṟkum kuttakai kuṭukka kaṭavatu Allavākavum Inta Irājakappaṭi cantirātittavaraiyum naṭatta kaṭavatu Ā
kavum Ita keṅkaik karaiyil kapilaiyaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭavaṉ śrīmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.736 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
